---
title: "Capabilities"
description: "iOS entitlements generated from project settings"
icon: "shield-check"
---

Capabilities generate iOS entitlement configuration for a project.

## Current capabilities

The current UI supports toggles for:

- Push Notifications
- Apple Pay
- HealthKit
- Sign in with Apple

## Generated file

Saving capabilities generates `AppShell.entitlements` in the project virtual file system.

## Apple Pay

Apple Pay requires a merchant ID. The default shape is:

```text
merchant.com.flow.app
```

## Future persistence

The current implementation regenerates an entitlement file from UI state. Persisting capability settings as durable project metadata is planned.
